description: Adversarial invariant for issue #65: through-silicon vias should enable advanced packaging, not depend on the broad packaging category.

checks.reason: TSV fabrication must not depend on the broad advanced-packaging application category.
TSVs should remain represented as one enabling route for 2.5D/3D packaging.
Broad advanced packaging includes TSV and non-TSV routes, so this should not become a hard required edge.
TSV fabrication should stay grounded in fabrication-process prerequisites.
The corrected direction should route from TSV technique toward packaging use.
The TSV node should not regress to a generated 1945 default.
The broad 2.5D/3D packaging node should remain later than TSV process development.
